hero.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
hero.author: Theodore Roosevelt

aries.general: Expect some surprises; a positive attitude will help you navigate through.
aries.love: Spend quality time with your partner to strengthen your bond.
aries.career: A new opportunity may arise; stay alert and be ready to seize it.

taurus.general: Focus on financial planning; a strategic approach pays off.
taurus.love: Open conversations with a partner can clear misunderstandings.
taurus.career: Your persistence will bring long-term success, so keep going.

gemini.general: Social interactions today will open new doors; network wisely.
gemini.love: Flirtation is in the air, ignite the spark with someone special.
gemini.career: Flexibility will be your greatest asset at work today.

cancer.general: Home is where the heart is; consider family dynamics carefully.
cancer.love: Empathy is the key; listen deeply to your loved ones.
cancer.career: Trust your instincts about a work-related decision.

leo.general: Be bold and embrace new challenges; fortune favors the brave.
leo.love: Creativity in expressing your feelings will enhance your romance.
leo.career: Your leadership skills will shine brightly in group projects.

virgo.general: Attention to detail today will save you from mishaps.
virgo.love: A practical approach can resolve any relationship issues now.
virgo.career: Organizational skills will be your strong suit; put them to use.

libra.general: Balance is vital today; try to harmonize your personal and professional life.
libra.love: Romantic gestures will go a long way in your relationship.
libra.career: Collaboration will lead to innovative ideas and solutions.

scorpio.general: Trust your intuition; it will guide you towards success.
scorpio.love: Emotional honesty creates a deeper connection with your partner.
scorpio.career: Ambition drives your work; focus on your long-term vision.

sagittarius.general: Open-mindedness will attract new perspectives today.
sagittarius.love: Adventure in love invites excitement; explore new places together.
sagittarius.career: Your creativity may spark innovative ideas at work.

capricorn.general: Stability is important; ensure you’re not taking on too much.
capricorn.love: Dedicate time to discuss future plans with your partner.
capricorn.career: Hard work will be recognized; stay diligent and focused.

aquarius.general: Change is on the horizon; be receptive to what comes your way.
aquarius.love: Intellectual conversations can ignite romance and connection.
aquarius.career: Innovation is your strength; don’t shy away from new ideas.

pisces.general: Creative expression will be fulfilling; let your imagination flow.
pisces.love: Empathy will deepen your romantic connections today.
pisces.career: Trust your instincts about a new project or partnership.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

professional.text: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
professional.author: Wayne Gretzky

motivation.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
motivation.author: Alan Kay

motivation.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
motivation.author: Christian D. Larson

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Success is not final; failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
motivation.author: Winston Churchill

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: Your time is limited, don't waste it living someone else's life.
motivation.author: Steve Jobs

captions.text: Dream big, work hard, and stay focused.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Every day is a second chance.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Stay positive, work hard, make it happen.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Believe you can and you are halfway there.
captions.author: Anonymous

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The technology you use impresses no one. The experience you create with it is everything.
tech.author: Sean Gerety

tech.text: It's not a faith in technology. It's faith in people.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: Technological progress is like an axe in the hands of a pathological criminal.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: The great growling engine of change - technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

fun.text: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I'm on a whiskey diet. I've lost three days already!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won't stop sending me beach wallpapers.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Why was the math book sad? It had too many problems.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I used to play piano by ear, but now I use my hands.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: There are two types of people in the world: those who love chocolate and liars.
fun.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: Everything that is done in the world is done by hope.
faith.author: Martin Luther

faith.text: You may be one person to the world, but you may be the world to one person.
faith.author: Dr. Seuss

faith.text: Faith is not belief without proof, but trust without reservation.
faith.author: D. Elton Trueblood

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: Wisdom comes from experience. Experience is often a result of lack of wisdom.
wisdom.author: Terry Pratchett

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
wisdom.author: Buddha
